# Issue 043: Enzyme Inhibition Mechanism

Update the enzyme core in `@atomika-lab/biochem` and `@atomika-lab/biology` to support pharmacological inhibition.

## 1. Add Inhibition Support
Enzymes must be able to change activity when a drug is bound to their active site.
- **Action:**
    - Add `inhibit(inhibitor: Molecule, bindingConstant: number)` to the base `Enzyme` class in `@atomika-lab/biochem`.

## 2. Integrate into RNA Polymerase
Update the transcription engine in `@atomika-lab/biology` to respond to inhibition.
